LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION (DEMURRER TO) TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR ACTUAL AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES; DEFT'S BERKOWITZ AND GRANT BLDG. CO., LLC.'S DEMURRER TO AND MOTION TO STRIKE PLNTF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR ACTUA, ARGUED, 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION BAD FAITH BREACH OF ORAL AND WRITTEN AGREEMENTS: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO CLARIFY ELEMENTS OF CONTRACT AND BREACH ETC WITH RESPECT TO EACH LANDLORD. 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION BAD FAITH BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTY: SUSTAIN WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF WARRANTY OF "TENANTABILITY" (CONTRACT): SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND DOCTRINE DOES NOT APPLY TO COMMERCIAL LEASES. 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF WARRANTY OF "TENANTABILITY" (TORT): SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND DOCTRINE DOES NOT APPLY TO COMMERCIAL LEASES. 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION NEGLIGENT MAINTENANCE OF PROPERTY: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO CLARIFY EXISTENCE OF DUTY, BREACH, CAUSATION AND DAMAGES AS TO EACH LANDLORD 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION WILLFULLY NEGLIGENT FAILURE TO REPAIR AND MAINTAIN ELEVATORS: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO CLARIFY EXISTENCE OF DUTY, BREACH, CAUSATION AND DAMAGES AS TO EACH LANDLORD 7TH CAUSE OF ACTION PROMISE WITHOUT INTENT TO PERFORM: SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FRAUD WITH REQUISITE SPECIFICITY, ESPECIALLY AS TO CORPORATE DEFENDANTS, AUTHORITY OF SPEAKERS TO MAKE REPRESENTATIONS, ETC. 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION BREACH OF STATUTORY DUTY UNDER CIVIL?1955: SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 9TH CAUSE OF ACTION INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS: SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PARAGRAPH 40 FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES: GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PARAGRAPH 66 FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES: MOOT BECAUSE DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE. PARAGRAPH 82 FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES: GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PARAGRAPH D AND E IN PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES: GRANT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN

DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF FIDUCIARY DUTIES, AS NO SUCH DUTIES ARE ESTABLISHED, AND AS TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT MAINTENANCE OF ELEVATORS, AS NEITHER DUTY NOR DAMAGES ARE ESTABLISHED). (AJR/JH)
